topics.name: Main Idea & Details
topics.description: Find the central message and identify supporting details in a passage

topics.name: Literary Elements
topics.description: Identify characters, setting, plot, problem, solution, and theme

topics.name: Making Inferences
topics.description: Use text evidence and background knowledge to draw conclusions

topics.name: Vocabulary in Context
topics.description: Use context clues to understand the meaning of unfamiliar words

topics.name: Author's Purpose
topics.description: Identify why an author wrote a text — to inform, persuade, or entertain
